title: Adopt SpecSync 5.0.1 and Trust 1.0.0 governance for swift-art
description: Adopt SpecSync 5.0.1 and Trust 1.0.0 governance for swift-art
acceptance_criteria: SpecSync 5.0.1 reports 100% file, LOC, and export coverage for all 49 source files; all four agents are installed; Trust doctor and the native Swift build and 255 tests pass; existing Ubuntu, macOS, CodeQL, and documentation workflows remain independent; immutable Trust runs on every pull request
